zh.lifeSummary: 當Enguerrand II de Ponthieu於1028年之前出生在法國時，他的父親Hugues de Ponthieu II24歲，母親Bertha d'Aumale22歲。他於1048年與Adelaide de Normandie結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1053年10月25日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉奧賓-素-希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enguerrand II de Ponthieu于1028年之前出生在法国时，他的父亲Hugues de Ponthieu II24岁，母亲Bertha d'Aumale22岁。他于1048年与Adelaide de Normandie结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1053年10月25日在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉奧賓-素-希。

en.Valognes, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Franc: Valognes, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Lower Normandy, France

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Enguerrand II de Ponthieu was born before 1028, in France, his father, Hugues de Ponthieu II, was 24 and his mother, Bertha d'Aumale, was 22. He married Adelaide de Normandie in 1048. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 October 1053, in Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enguerrand II de Ponthieu est né avant 1028, à France, son père, Hugues de Ponthieu II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Bertha d'Aumale, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Normandie en 1048. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1053, à Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enguerrand II de Ponthieu vor 1028 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Ponthieu II 24 und seine Mutter Bertha d'Aumale 22. Er hat 1048 Adelaide de Normandie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1053 in Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand II de Ponthieu è nato il prima del 1028 nel Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Ponthieu II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Bertha d'Aumale, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Normandie nel 1048. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1053, nel Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, F: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメサイント-リクイエル
ja.Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime,: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-リクイエル-eス-プレインス
ja.Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Up: フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-アウビン-スル-スシ
ja.Valognes, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Franc: フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェチェルボウルグ-オクテヴィルヴァログンス
ja.lifeSummary: Enguerrand II de Ponthieuが1028年以前にフランスで生まれた時，父Hugues de Ponthieu IIは24歳，母Bertha d'Aumaleは22歳であった。1048年にAdelaide de Normandieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1053年10月25日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-アウビン-スル-スシで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Enguerrand II de Ponthieu(이)가 1028년 이전 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Ponthieu II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha d'Aumale(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1048년 Adelaide de Normandie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1053년 10월 25일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-오빈-수-스시에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enguerrand II de Ponthieu nasceu antes 1028, em França, seu pai, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Bertha d'Aumale, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Normandie em 1048. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1053, em Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enguerrand II de Ponthieu родился перед 1028 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Ponthieu II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha d'Aumale, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Normandie в 1048 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1053 г. в местности сеинт-аубин-сур-сси, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

sm.from 1000 to 1035: mai le 1000 e o'o I le 1035

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enguerrand II de Ponthieu nació antes de 1028, en Francia, su papá, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Bertha d'Aumale, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Normandie en 1048. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1053, en Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
